design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate maze, consume all dots while avoiding ghost pursuers; eat power pellets to reverse roles and hunt ghosts for bonus points
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Spatial awareness and evasion against four AI-driven ghosts with distinct behavioral patterns; resource tension between safe pellet consumption and exposure to ghost pursuit
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Outwitting intelligent enemies through maze mastery and tactical use of temporary power reversal; appeal to broader audience beyond traditional arcade game demographics
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Deliberately designed to appeal to women and non-traditional gamers through cute, colorful characters and non-violent gameplay; maze-chase rather than combat-focused; elegant simplicity of rules with emergent strategic depth

difficulty.lives_system: Multiple lives; game ends when all lives lost after being caught by ghosts
difficulty.checkpointing: Level-based progression; advancing to next level upon consuming all dots in current maze
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Difficulty increases systematically through progression: ghosts accelerate speed, power pellet duration decreases, energizers eventually disappear entirely. Player has no direct difficulty selection but can develop mastery through pattern learning and ghost AI prediction

progression.unlock_mechanism: Level advancement through maze completion; fruit bonus items appear at milestones within levels
replayability_hooks: Increasing difficulty curve encourages mastery and speedrunning attempts
Ghost AI patterns reward learning and prediction
Pattern memorization and route optimization across levels

world_building_techniques: Inter-level cutscenes featuring Pac-Man and Blinky in humorous, comical situations
Level progression indicated by fruit icons providing implicit narrative progression
Anthropomorphized ghosts with distinct personalities conveyed through unique AI behaviors

boss_design.philosophy: No traditional boss encounters; instead, four ghost enemies function as persistent antagonists with individual AI personalities that evolve throughout progression. Blinky (red) provides direct chase; Pinky (pink) and Inky (cyan) employ predictive interception; Clyde (orange) adapts behavior based on distance proximity.
notable_bosses: Clyde (Orange Ghost) - proximity-adaptive switching between chase and flee

faction_indicators: Four distinct ghost personalities create implicit team dynamic
Ghosts coordinate implicitly through shared maze space and overlapping pursuit patterns
danger_signals: Ghost acceleration and speed increases as levels progress signal mounting threat
Power pellet effect duration decrease removes safety valve for evasion
Kill screen at level 256 represents ultimate difficulty ceiling
environmental_storytelling: Maze structure provides implicit boundaries and strategic chokepoints
Warp tunnels create tactical escape routes with speed penalties for ghosts
Power pellet placement at maze corners offers temporary inversion of hunter/hunted dynamic
Bonus fruit items signal progression milestones within level structure
